summary: PR 2325 decompiled or improved two Ground stage functions: grIceMt_801F91EC in Ice Mountain and grKongo_801D8078 in Kongo. It also updated gricemt.h to replace an UNK_RET placeholder with the recovered grIceMt_801F91EC signature and added an item header include needed by grkongo.c. The automated report records grIceMt_801F91EC as a new 100% match and grKongo_801D8078 as an unmatched-item improvement to 98.43%. The PR body text appears unrelated to the actual changed files and title, so the diff and report are stronger evidence than the body summary.

key_files.role: Renamed/decompiled grIceMt_801F91EC from FUN_801f91ec, removed the decomp marker, set up a Ground pointer via GET_GROUND, initialized a s16 parameter array, called grAnime_801C7A04 with 0 as the final argument, and installed an mpJoint callback.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gricemt.c hunk around declaration and function body
issue_comment: report lists grIceMt_801F91EC as 176 bytes, 0.00% to 100.00%

key_files.role: Updated the public declaration for grIceMt_801F91EC from UNK_RET grIceMt_801F91EC(HSD_GObj*) to the recovered void signature with HSD_GObj*, s16*, integer parameters, and mpLib_Callback.

Implemented grKongo_801D8078 as an item scan over HSD_GObj_Entities->items, selecting item kind 0xDA and returning the first item within a squared radius from a Ground_801C4DA0 position. Added include "it/it_26B1.h" for item helpers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grkongo.c include hunk and grKongo_801D8078 body
issue_comment: report lists grKongo_801D8078 as 185 bytes, 0.00% to 98.43%

what_changed.text: grIceMt_801F91EC was promoted from a placeholder/commented decomp target and local FUN_801f91ec-style name to a named function body matching the title symbol.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed /// #grIceMt_801F91EC and renamed FUN_801f91ec to grIceMt_801F91EC

what_changed.text: The grIceMt_801F91EC header prototype was made truthful for the recovered body, replacing UNK_RET and incomplete parameters.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gricemt.h UNK_RET grIceMt_801F91EC(HSD_GObj*) changed to void grIceMt_801F91EC(HSD_GObj*, s16*, int, int, int, int, int, mpLib_Callback)

what_changed.text: grIceMt_801F91EC now calls grAnime_801C7A04 with final argument 0 instead of -20 for both animation calls in the recovered body.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grAnime_801C7A04(param_1, param_3, 7, -20) changed to final argument 0; same for param_4 branch

what_changed.text: grKongo_801D8078 was implemented as a loop over item GObjs, filters by itGetKind(cur) == 0xDA, computes squared distance to a stage/ground position, and returns the first item within grKg_804D6980->unk28 radius.
The automated report recorded one new full match for grIceMt_801F91EC and one partial improvement for grKongo_801D8078.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment by encounter: grIceMt_801F91EC 0.00% to 100.00%; grKongo_801D8078 0.00% to 98.43%

smart_moves.text: The PR paired the recovered grIceMt_801F91EC body with the owning header prototype update instead of leaving an UNK_RET/incomplete declaration behind.
The grKongo implementation uses squared-distance comparison against r * r, avoiding an unnecessary square root while matching the likely assembly shape for radius checks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: dx2 + dy2 + dz2 < r * r

smart_moves.text: The item scan is expressed as a natural for loop over cur = cur->next rather than a generated-looking branch ladder.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: for (cur = HSD_GObj_Entities->items; cur != NULL; cur = cur->next)

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered function body proves the actual signature, update the owning header at the same time so UNK_RET and incomplete parameters do not survive the decomp.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gricemt.h prototype changed from UNK_RET to full signature

decomp_lessons.lesson: For stage logic that searches active item objects, a natural loop over HSD_GObj_Entities->items with helper calls such as itGetKind and it_8026B294 can be reviewable and close to the recovered behavior.
Distance/radius checks can often be expressed as squared component sums compared with r * r when the source computes dx, dy, dz and avoids sqrt-like behavior.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: dx/dy/dz, dx2/dy2/dz2, r, and comparison dx2 + dy2 + dz2 < r * r

naming_conventions.text: Recovered stage functions keep the subsystem/address symbol form, e.g. grIceMt_801F91EC and grKongo_801D8078, rather than retaining generated FUN_801f91ec naming.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKongo_801D8078 body added at former decomp marker

naming_conventions.text: Clear local role names were used where evident: gp for Ground*, pos for the reference position, item_pos for item position, and cur for the current item GObj.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Vec3 pos; Vec3 item_pos; HSD_GObj* cur

naming_conventions.text: Some parameters remained param_N where the PR slice does not prove semantic roles, consistent with conservative naming.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grIceMt_801F91EC parameter names param_1 through param_8

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Use a for loop over HSD_GObj_Entities->items with cur = cur->next for list traversal.
Compute dx, dy, dz and separate squared temporary variables before the radius comparison, preserving a source shape that produced a 98.43% improvement for grKongo_801D8078.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: f32 dx, dy, dz, dx2, dy2, dz2, r

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Use the real item helper prototypes by adding the relevant include rather than relying on implicit or local declarations.

review_feedback.text: No inline review comments or formal reviews were present in the loaded PR slice.
The available issue comment is an automated match report, not reviewer feedback: grIceMt_801F91EC reached 100.00%, grKongo_801D8078 improved to 98.43%, and gricemt .sdata2 improved to 62.12%.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR title, author, merge state, changed files
text_corpus.jsonl: PR body and issue comment
notes: The PR title, changed files, and automated report consistently concern grIceMt_801F91EC and grKongo_801D8078.
The PR body summary appears unrelated, naming IsNameUnique in mnname.c and un_80305D00 in toy.c; those files are not in the changed-file list or diff.

The PR body claims fuzzy_match_percent 100.0 for all functions, but the issue report says grKongo_801D8078 improved only to 98.43%. The issue report is treated as stronger evidence for match status because it names the actual changed stage units.
No review comments are available, so reviewer intent and requested changes cannot be inferred.
The diff supports what source changed, but does not by itself prove all semantic names or remaining mismatch causes.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update owning headers when a decompiled body proves a signature
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2325, grIceMt_801F91EC was decompiled in gricemt.c and gricemt.h was updated from UNK_RET grIceMt_801F91EC(HSD_GObj*) to the recovered void signature with all parameters. This is a concrete example of pairing body recovery with truthful header cleanup.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Stage item search as natural GObj list loop with squared-radius comparison
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2325 implemented grKongo_801D8078 as a natural loop over HSD_GObj_Entities->items, filtering item kind 0xDA, reading each item position, and comparing squared distance against r * r. The report shows this raised grKongo_801D8078 from 0.00% to 98.43%.

source_update_candidates.title: Header prototype cleanup example for truthful-headers standard
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2325 can serve as an example for the existing truthful-headers-and-includes standard: after recovering grIceMt_801F91EC, the PR updated gricemt.h to replace UNK_RET and incomplete parameters with the recovered signature.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gricemt.h prototype changed from UNK_RET to full signature
source_update_candidates.reason: This is not a new standard, but it is a concise supporting example for an existing accepted standard.

source_update_candidates.title: PR body mismatch should not be used as semantic evidence for PR 2325
source_update_candidates.text: The loaded PR body discusses IsNameUnique in mnname.c and un_80305D00 in toy.c, while the title, changed files, diff, and report are about grIceMt_801F91EC and grKongo_801D8078. Curated records for this PR should prefer the diff and automated report over the body summary.
source_update_candidates.reason: Prevents unrelated PR-body claims from being promoted into knowledge about this stage decomp PR.

rejection_notes: Do not record IsNameUnique, mnname.c, un_80305D00, toy.c, name entry, or trophy viewer input as facts about PR 2325's changed code; those appear only in the mismatched PR body and are contradicted by title, changed files, and diff.
Do not claim grKongo_801D8078 fully matched; the automated report says it improved from 0.00% to 98.43%, not 100.00%.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale or requested changes; no review comments or formal reviews are present in the loaded slice.
Do not promote item kind 0xDA or grKg_804D6980->unk28 semantic meaning beyond what the diff shows; the slice does not name the item or field.
